description: A rename that updates static call sites but misses string-keyed or reflective references, breaking at runtime.
body: Failure mode: a symbol is renamed and all compiler-visible uses are updated, but references via reflection, dependency-injection keys, serialized field names, or config strings are not, so the build passes and the code fails at runtime. Detection signals: green compile but runtime 'not found'/missing-key errors; serialized data no longer deserializes; DI resolution fails. Do not trust the compiler alone for renames of string-addressed symbols. Safer fallback: enumerate dynamic and string-based references before renaming, update them together, and run the integration tests that exercise the dynamic paths.
